details.test: Task 1: Add most recent ecocriticism article to new reading list
Task 2: Create folder with 3 ecocriticism research articles
Task 3: Open special issue article and view references
Task 4: Compare two articles by citations and save the more cited to reading list
Task 5: Select 2 pre-2010 ecocriticism articles and save to reading list
Task 6: Set up weekly Modernist Studies research-article alert
Task 7: Generate MLA citation and store it in a note
Task 8: Select 2 long articles (16+ pages) and save to folder
Task 9: Identify most cited Victorian author (2000–2010) and view profile
